channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: La Rolls des consoles est de retour, et elle accepte vos vieilles cartouches
item.description: Avec la Neo-Geo AES+, SNK ressuscite son mythe sans passer par la case émulation.

item.title: Asus TUF Gaming A14 (2026) Review: GPU-Less Gaming Laptop
item.description: A gaming laptop without a discrete graphics card feels revolutionary, but the TUF Gaming A14 doesn't quite take full advantage of AMD's daring new silicon.

item.title: Schematik Is ‘Cursor for Hardware.’ Anthropic Wants In
item.description: Schematik is a program that aims to help people vibe code for physical devices. Hopefully, it won’t blow anything up.

item.title: It Takes 2 Minutes to Hack the EU’s New Age-Verification App
item.description: Plus: Major data breaches at a gym chain and hotel giant, a disruptive DDoS attack against Bluesky, dubious ICE hires, and more.

item.title: Where to Shop for Vinyl Records Online (2026): Discogs, Bandcamp, Ebay
item.description: Don’t just load up an Amazon cart! Here are the better ways to find your favorite vinyl records online.

item.title: How I quit social media for a month… and then ended up right back where I started
item.description: Here's what I learnt after trying to kick Reddit and YouTube cold turkey for a month.

item.title: ICYMI: the 7 biggest tech stories of the week, from new GoPro cameras to the 'most beautiful phone of 2026'
item.description: If you haven't been keeping tabs on the technology headlines over the past seven days, we've got you covered.

item.title: Private student loans: A cautionary guide to your options
item.description: Even if you’re facing a funding gap, here’s why you might want to think twice before cosigning your kid’s private student loan. Spring is in the air! The tulips are blooming, college acceptance letters are zooming into email inboxes, and the majority of parents with college-bound students are panicking about paying for their kid’s schooling.

item.title: Home prices are falling in these 89 housing markets—see what’s behind it
item.description: After a burst of softening, the count of major metros seeing year-over-year home price declines has stabilized over the past nine months. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: PlayStation 6 : puce Amethyst, jeux, lancement, prix… Tout ce que l’on sait sur la future console
item.description: Sony prépare la prochaine génération de consoles PlayStation. Voici tout ce que l'on sait déjà sur la future PS6.

item.title: The Best Movies to Stream This Month (April 2026)
item.description: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple, Crime 101, and Deathstalker are among the films deserving of your eyeballs this month

item.title: Astell & Kern's off-shoot brand just dropped some of the best budget audiophile earbuds of the year — and you won't believe how cheap they are
item.description: Astell & Kern's budget-brand, Activo, is back again — here's what I thought of it's new pebble-like in-ear monitors.

item.title: I would ditch all my headphones in favor of these brilliant open earbuds' stacked feature set, were it not for one flaw...
item.description: As sports-specific open earbuds go, the Shokz OpenFit Pro are as good as it gets and their feature set means you'll nearly ditch anything else...

item.title: Amazon brade à -20 % ce lot de 2 caméras Arlo boostées à l’IA, parfait pour sécuriser votre maison
item.description: Avec l'Arlo Essential 3 HD et son application, il est possible de surveiller en permanence ce qui se passe chez vous. Un duo à retrouver pour 159,99 euros au lieu de 199,99 euros chez Amazon.

item.title: L’Europe veut ouvrir la boîte noire de Google à ses concurrents, le DMA est là pour ça
item.description: Google s'est bâti sur des milliards de clics. Bruxelles vient d'inviter ses concurrents, chatbots IA compris, à venir se servir.

item.title: Sonys barely updated Bluetooth turntable is still the perfect record player for beginners
item.description: After seven years, Sony has finally ventured back into the world of Bluetooth turntables. This spring, the company released the Sony PS-LX3BT ($399.99) and the Sony PS-LX5BT ($499.99), a pair of replacements for its original PS-LX310BT record player.

item.title: 14 jours sans Internet sur smartphone : les effets surprenants sur votre cerveau
item.description: Dix ans de vieillissement cognitif effacés en deux semaines. Voilà ce qu'une étude vient de mesurer sur des adultes privés d'internet mobile.

item.title: Narwal Flow 2 robot vacuum review: The most insightful AI mess detection yet for a decent price
item.description: The Narwal Flow 2 isn't just another roller mop robot vacuum. Its inaugural drop to $1,099.99 packs legit AI smarts and absorbent mopping.

item.title: The ‘Lonely Runner’ Problem Only Appears Simple
item.description: Take a group of runners circling a track at unique, constant paces. Answering the question of how many will always end up running alone, no matter their speed, has vexed mathematicians for decades.

item.title: The Pitt season 3: shock cast changes and everything we know so far about the hit HBO Max medical drama's return
item.description: Now that season 2's explosive finale is behind us, all eyes are on The Pitt season 3. But what do we actually know about the hit HBO Max show's return?

item.title: How to hide your sensitive info (for real) when using ChatGPT and other AI chatbots
item.description: There’s a right way, and a wrong way. Don’t choose the wrong way. Like many, I’ve never met a chatbot I trust completely. Not only do they have a propensity to hallucinate by making up facts, but you can never be sure what their parent companies do with the information you provide. Most AI companies say they use your data to further train their models, but anonymize it first. However, you just have to take them at their word on this....

item.title: Is pop culture giving non-monogamy a bad name?
item.description: Non-monogamy has been highlighted by pop culture including Lily Allen's "West End Girl," Lindy West's "Adult Braces," and HBO's "Industry" — but is that a good thing?

item.title: T-Mobile is giving away the Apple iPhone 17 for free — how to claims yours this weekend
item.description: How to get free iPhone. Get the Apple iPhone 17 for free from T-Mobile when you trade in an eligible device and sign up for the Experience More plan.

item.title: The DJI Mini 5 Pro drone is $500 off at Amazon — act fast to save on this beginner-friendly drone
item.description: The DJI Mini 5 Pro Fly More Combo is on sale for $1,099 at Amazon, saving you $500 on list price.

item.title: Euphoria made sex work go viral. Real sex workers are still getting censored.
item.description: Sex work portrayals on HBO's 'Euphoria' are inaccurate, and can hurt real-life workers.

item.title: Cats: The Jellicle Ball review: Ballroom and Cats are a match made in the Heaviside Layer
item.description: "Cats: The Jellicle Ball" brings ballroom culture to Andrew Lloyd Webber's polarizing musical, and the result is astounding.

item.title: Lifetime access to this Montessori-style learning app for kids is now 76% off
item.description: Save 76% on Pok Pok for a limited time.

item.title: All Babbel language courses are now available for life during this limited-time deal
item.description: Babbel is a language-learning tool for 14 different languages, and a lifetime subscription is now available for an exclusive price

item.title: Get over $1,000 off a MacBook Pro — last chance to save
item.description: Save on a MacBook Pro by shopping refurbished for just $399.99.

item.title: How to unblock Pornhub for free
item.description: How to unblock porn for free. Unblock and watch Pornhub for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: La fin d’une ère : Amazon dit définitivement au revoir à Android sur ses produits Fire TV
item.description: Amazon
